---
title: "What I currently do"
image: images/headShot.jpeg
toc: false
about: 
  template: solana
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/patrick-bolger-66b1b41/
    - text: Research Gate
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Patrick_Bolger
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/patrickabolger
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:patrick.bolger@nottingham.ac.uk
---

I am currently a *Community Development Champion* in the <a href="https://www.nottingham.ac.uk/psychology/welcome-to-psychology.aspx" target="_blank">School of Psychology</a> at <a href="https://www.nottingham.ac.uk/" target="_blank">the University of Nottingham</a> in the United Kingdom. I work mostly with the team at <a href="https://opensciencetools.org/" target="_blank">Open Science Tools, Ltd.</a> (the makers of the open-source software for psychological experiments <a href="https://www.psychopy.org/" target="_blank">PsychoPy</a>, and its online sister, <a href="https://pavlovia.org/docs/home/about" target="_blank">Pavlovia</a>). I was hired through funding from an <a href="https://chanzuckerberg.com/eoss/" target="_blank">Essential Open Source Software for Science</a> grant from the <a href="https://chanzuckerberg.com/" target="_blank">Chan Zuckerberg Initiative</a>, obtained by the fun, friendly, upstanding team at PsychoPy.
